name: Roasted Potatoes with Garlic and Thyme
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds small potatoes: Red Bliss, small whites, Yukon Golds
3 cloves garlic, peeled and finely minced
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Leaving their skins on, scrub the potatoes with a brush to remove any dirt or blemishes. Dry them with paper towels or a cloth.
3. Cut the potatoes in half or quarters, depending on size.
4. Pour the olive oil into a roasting pan or large cast-iron skillet and heat in the oven for 10 minutes before adding the potatoes.
5. Roast the potatoes for 45 minutes, until crisp. Shake the pan several times during cooking to ensure even browning.
6. Remove from the oven and drain on paper towels or a cloth to absorb excess oil. Place in a serving dish.
7. In a sauté pan, melt the butter, then add the garlic and cook until light golden brown. Add the chopped herbs, stir quickly, and remove from heat.
8. Pour the garlic-herb butter over the potatoes, season with salt and pepper, and serve.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
